text_original: Colour's five hues from the eyes their sight will take;
text_normalized: Colour's five hues from the eyes their sight will take;

text_original: Music's five notes the ears as deaf can make;
text_normalized: Music's five notes the ears as deaf can make;

text_original: The flavours five deprive the mouth of taste;
text_normalized: The flavours five deprive the mouth of taste;

text_original: The chariot course, and the wild hunting waste
text_normalized: The chariot course, and the wild hunting waste

text_original: Make mad the mind; and objects rare and strange,
text_normalized: Make mad the mind; and objects rare and strange,

text_original: Sought for, men's conduct will to evil change.
text_normalized: Sought for, men's conduct will to evil change.

text_original: Therefore the sage seeks to satisfy (the craving of) the belly, and not the (insatiable longing of the) eyes.
text_normalized: Therefore the sage seeks to satisfy (the craving of) the belly, and not the (insatiable longing of the) eyes.

text_original: He puts from him the latter, and prefers to seek the former.
text_normalized: He puts from him the latter, and prefers to seek the former.
